CustomField.description: Accumulated risk delta points from NEPA_Challenge_Prediction_Rule__mdt records matched by the NEPA_Challenge_Predictor flow. Each matched rule contributes its Risk_Delta__c value. Passed as additional input to the BRE scoring pipeline.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Additional risk points from matched challenge prediction rules (sector-circuit, tribal plaintiff). Feeds the litigation risk composite score.
CustomField.label: Challenge Risk Delta Points
